title: Grounding Atlas
tagline: Every definition is made of words you also have to look up — this maps the loops and finds the words underneath them all

functionality.name: Definition circularity map
functionality.blurb: Maps how dictionary definitions refer to other words that themselves need looking up, across roughly 500 real definitions.

functionality.name: Loop detection
functionality.blurb: Finds the circular loops where words are ultimately defined in terms of each other.

functionality.name: Primitive word isolation
functionality.blurb: Isolates the small set of primitive words that everything else is ultimately defined in terms of.

detail_body: If you look up a word, its definition uses other words — which you also have to look up. Grounding Atlas maps that circularity across ~500 real dictionary definitions.
It finds the loops in that web and isolates the small set of primitive words everything else is ultimately defined in terms of.
